hooks.command: FILE="$FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'JanguBiUI'; then cd /home/sosza/PycharmProjects/Numerisen/JanguBiUI && yarn prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; true; fi

FILE="$FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'JanguBiUI'; then cd /home/sosza/PycharmProjects/Numerisen/JanguBiUI && yarn eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; true; fi
FILE="$FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'JanguBiUI'; then cd /home/sosza/PycharmProjects/Numerisen/JanguBiUI && yarn check-types 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
